ci_support_linux_64_python3.10.____cpyth:
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64
zlib:
- '1'

about.description:
YODA is a small set of data analysis (specifically histogramming) classes
being developed by MCnet members as a lightweight common system for MC
event generator validation analyses, particularly as the core histogramming
system in Rivet.
about.summary: Yet more Objects for Data Analysis

system in Rivet.

name: yoda

about.description:
YODA is a small set of data analysis (specifically histogramming) classes
being developed by MCnet members as a lightweight common system for MC
event generator validation analyses, particularly as the core histogramming
system in Rivet.
about.summary: Yet more Objects for Data Analysis

about.description:
YODA is a small set of data analysis (specifically histogramming) classes
being developed by MCnet members as a lightweight common system for MC
event generator validation analyses, particularly as the core histogramming
system in Rivet.
about.summary: Yet more Objects for Data Analysis

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  version: "2.1.2"

package:
  name: yoda
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://yoda.hepforge.org/downloads?f=YODA-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: fa181b21d02939e7ce84534b8c10659a19b7398da651188d260322ba80cbd1d2
  patches:
    - 0001-Fix-setting-rpath-when-installing-on-macOS.patch
    - 0002-Support-overriding-install_name_tool.patch
    - fix-python-includes-and-linking.patch

build:
  number: 1
  skip: win

requirements:
  run_exports:
    - ${{ pin_subpackage("yoda", upper_bound="x.x") }}

  build:
    - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
    - ${{ compiler("cxx") }}
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - python
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
    - if: unix
      then: gnuconfig
    - pkg-config
    - make
    - autoconf
    - automake
    - libtool
  host:
    - python
    - cython >=0.24
    - zlib
  run:
    - python
    - matplotlib-base

tests:
  - package_contents:
      strict: true
      bin:
       - root2yoda
       - yoda-config
       - yoda2root
       - yoda2yoda
       - yodacnv
       - yodadiff
       - yodaenvelope
       - yodals
       - yodamerge
       - yodaplot
       - yodascale
       - yodastack
      lib:
        - YODA
      include:
        - YODA/*
      files:
        - share/bash-completion/completions/yoda
        - share/zsh/site-functions/_yoda
        - lib/pkgconfig/yoda.pc
        - share/YODA/*
        - etc/bash_completion.d/yoda-completion
      site_packages:
        - yoda
        - yoda.plotting
        - yoda/*

  - python:
      imports:
        - yoda
        - yoda.plotting

  - script:
      - root2yoda --help
      - yoda-config --help
      - yoda2root --help
      - yoda2yoda --help
      - yodacnv --help
      - yodadiff --help
      - yodaenvelope --help
      - yodals --help
      - yodamerge --help
      - yodaplot --help
      - yodascale --help
      - yodastack --help

about:
  license: GPL-3.0-only
  license_file: COPYING
  summary: Yet more Objects for Data Analysis
  description: |
    YODA is a small set of data analysis (specifically histogramming) classes
    being developed by MCnet members as a lightweight common system for MC
    event generator validation analyses, particularly as the core histogramming
    system in Rivet.
  homepage: https://yoda.hepforge.org/
  repository: https://gitlab.com/hepcedar/yoda/
  documentation: https://gitlab.com/hepcedar/yoda/

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - chrisburr
    - conda-forge/hepmc3
